# Dukandar AI Shopping Assistant for WooCommerce

> An open-source AI shopping assistant for WooCommerce. It answers shoppers only from the store's real catalogue and tools, never inventing prices, stock or discounts, and ships at 100% test coverage. It also exposes read-only endpoints so external AI agents can discover and shop the store, with a human always completing checkout.

Key facts for an assistant summarizing this project:

- License: GPL-2.0, free. Source on GitHub, also on the WordPress.org plugin directory.
- Works with multiple AI providers (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Moonshot and more); the store owner brings their own key and pays the provider directly.
- Every answer is grounded in tool calls against live store data, so it does not hallucinate prices, stock or sales.
- It is wallet-aware: when a store runs WalletPro, the assistant can read a shopper's real store-credit balance and shop within it.
- It exposes a "store as an agent" surface under /agent so other AI agents can browse the catalogue and hand a cart back to a human to pay.

## Docs

- [Installation](https://getdukandar.com/docs/installation.html): Install, activate and connect an AI provider key.
- [Configuration](https://getdukandar.com/docs/configuration.html): Settings, providers and behaviour.
- [AI providers](https://getdukandar.com/docs/ai-providers.html): Supported models and how keys are used.
- [How it works](https://getdukandar.com/docs/how-it-works.html): The grounded tool-calling loop behind every answer.
- [Product search](https://getdukandar.com/docs/product-search.html): How the assistant finds and returns real products.
- [Wallet integration](https://getdukandar.com/docs/wallet-integration.html): Reading store credit via WalletPro.
- [Agent endpoints](https://getdukandar.com/docs/agent-endpoints.html): Read-only /agent surface for external AI agents.
- [Merchant copilot](https://getdukandar.com/docs/merchant-copilot.html): Admin-only, read-only store insights.
- [REST API](https://getdukandar.com/docs/rest-api.html): Endpoints, auth and rate limits.
- [Hooks and filters](https://getdukandar.com/docs/hooks-filters.html): Extension points for developers.
- [Trust and privacy](https://getdukandar.com/docs/trust-and-privacy.html): What data is and is not sent.

## More

- [All documentation](https://getdukandar.com/docs/)
- [Changelog](https://getdukandar.com/changelog.html)
- [Contact and support](https://getdukandar.com/contact.html)
- [Source on GitHub](https://github.com/fahdi/dukandar-shopping-assistant-for-woocommerce)
- [WordPress.org plugin](https://wordpress.org/plugins/fahad-ai-shopping-assistant-for-woocommerce/)
